entries.name: Zotero
entries.licensePolicy: study UX and interchange formats; do not copy code/translators without review
entries.risk: Translator code, sync semantics, attachments, and annotations need separate license/privacy review.
entries.nextSlice: Zotero RDF import/export or Better BibTeX citation-key preservation.

entries.name: ASReview
entries.licensePolicy: study workflow concepts; do not port model/UI code without review
entries.risk: Opaque ranking could undermine auditable systematic-review decisions if copied uncritically.
entries.nextSlice: Persist prioritization runs with input hashes, seed counts, method, and ranked output.

entries.name: GROBID
entries.licensePolicy: call as an external/local service; do not vendor code
entries.risk: Parser version and TEI output changes can affect reproducibility and reference extraction quality.
entries.nextSlice: Normalize parsed references against Crossref/OpenAlex/Semantic Scholar while preserving raw text.

entries.name: metafor
entries.licensePolicy: call installed R/metafor through explicit external-tool adapter
entries.risk: Statistical outputs require version capture, warnings, and reproducible scripts.
entries.nextSlice: Add leave-one-out sensitivity analysis command.

entries.name: Semantic Scholar
entries.licensePolicy: use public API under terms/rate limits; redact API keys
entries.risk: Quota/rate limits and field restrictions require explicit backoff and provenance policy.
entries.nextSlice: Add quota-aware backoff and resumable graph expansion run files.

entries.name: OpenAlex
entries.licensePolicy: use public API respectfully with documented request parameters and provenance
entries.risk: Broad graph imports need pagination, cursor capture, and deduplication across sources.
entries.nextSlice: Add paginated search/import with frozen query and cursor state.

entries.name: Qdrant
entries.licensePolicy: call as optional configured service; keep embeddings local unless configured
entries.risk: Embedding model/version and payload privacy must be locked before semantic retrieval claims.
entries.nextSlice: Add Qdrant adapter interface implementation with fake-backed tests.

entries.name: OpenSearch
entries.licensePolicy: optional external service; record endpoint/config without secrets
entries.risk: Index mappings and partial bulk-index failures need versioned provenance.
entries.nextSlice: Add OpenSearch adapter contract and fake-backed tests before live integration.

entries.name: s2orc-doc2json
entries.licensePolicy: call as external conversion tool or format reference; do not vendor code/fixtures without review
entries.risk: Generated JSON shape and parser versions can alter evidence offsets and bibliography links.
entries.nextSlice: Add S2ORC-style JSON reader into parsed-document model.

entries.name: PaperMage
entries.licensePolicy: study document-model ideas; do not port code/models without review
entries.risk: Layered document models require stable offsets and provider provenance to avoid evidence drift.
entries.nextSlice: Extend PaperMage-style JSON adapter with stable offsets, annotation layers, and multi-parser reconciliation.

entries.name: Anystyle
entries.licensePolicy: call as optional external parser; do not vendor code/training data without review
entries.risk: Reference parser confidence and ambiguous fields need reviewer-visible normalization state.
entries.nextSlice: Add optional plain-text reference parse command with fake-backed tests.

entries.name: CERMINE
entries.licensePolicy: optional external fallback; do not vendor Java artifacts or sample documents without review
entries.risk: Fallback parser outputs can conflict with GROBID and need quality comparison before acceptance.
entries.nextSlice: Build parser comparison report over existing parsed-document JSON files.

entries.name: Science Parse
entries.licensePolicy: historical/reference study only unless maintenance and licensing are revalidated
entries.risk: Stale parser maintenance status can create reproducibility and security risk.
entries.nextSlice: Add parser candidate scoring for maintenance, footprint, output coverage, and license constraints.

entries.name: JabRef
entries.licensePolicy: study BibTeX/BibLaTeX workflows and UX; do not port Java code/assets without review
entries.risk: BibTeX cleanup can silently alter citation keys or LaTeX fields if not reviewable.
entries.nextSlice: Add BibTeX/BibLaTeX quality report with citation-key, group, and field-normalization diffs.

entries.name: RobotReviewer
entries.licensePolicy: study RCT evidence/risk-of-bias workflow concepts; do not port models or biomedical training data without review
entries.risk: Automated risk-of-bias or evidence extraction can appear authoritative without source-linked reviewer approval.
entries.nextSlice: Add risk-of-bias extraction schema and citation-locked suggestion review workflow.

entries.name: revtools
entries.licensePolicy: study systematic-review UX and clustering workflows; keep R package integration optional
entries.risk: Visual clustering/dedup decisions need reproducible inputs and human-confirmed merge provenance.
entries.nextSlice: Add review-cluster map for deduplication and screening with exportable decision history.

entries.name: PyMARE
entries.licensePolicy: optional Python engine adapter; record environment and package versions; do not vendor code
entries.risk: Multiple statistics engines can disagree unless model settings, versions, and warnings are made explicit.
entries.nextSlice: Add secondary meta-analysis engine comparison report against metafor fixtures.

entries.name: SentenceTransformers
entries.licensePolicy: call configured local/remote embedding service; model license and text egress require explicit user approval
entries.risk: Embedding private abstracts/passages can leak sensitive text and model changes break retrieval reproducibility.
entries.nextSlice: Add embedding model registry with license, dimension, egress, and reproducibility metadata.

entries.name: BERTopic
entries.licensePolicy: study topic-modeling workflow; optional external adapter only after dependency/license review
entries.risk: Topic labels can overstate semantic meaning unless tied to source papers and reproducible model settings.
entries.nextSlice: Add topic-cluster/domain-map artifact with source paper links and model provenance.

entries.name: SciSpaCy
entries.licensePolicy: optional NLP adapter; model licenses and biomedical text handling require review
entries.risk: Entity extraction errors can propagate into evidence schemas or query expansion without reviewer validation.
entries.nextSlice: Add scientific entity extraction suggestions with confidence and reviewer acceptance state.

entries.name: KeyBERT
entries.licensePolicy: study keyword extraction UX; optional adapter only with model/license review
entries.risk: Keyword suggestions can bias searches if not recorded with source passages and reviewer approval.
entries.nextSlice: Add citation-linked keyword/query-expansion suggestions from abstracts and accepted passages.

entries.name: NASA ADS
entries.licensePolicy: use API under ADS terms with token redaction, rate limits, and field-specific provenance
entries.risk: ADS API tokens, bibcodes, and astronomy-specific metadata need source-specific provenance and caching policy.
entries.nextSlice: Add NASA ADS connector for bibcode/DOI search and citation expansion with mocked tests.

entries.name: DOAJ / CORE
entries.licensePolicy: use public APIs under attribution/rate limits; CORE credentials and redistribution rules must be documented
entries.risk: OA metadata does not guarantee full-text redistribution rights; license and source URL must remain explicit.
entries.nextSlice: Add DOAJ/CORE OA discovery adapter with license-aware full-text candidate queue.

dashboardRequirements.connectorHealthControlCenter: The /connectors local cockpit shows live-smoke history, API drift alerts, cache status, credential redaction checks, rate-limit budgets, and adapter capability registry coverage from the protocol registry and project snapshots.
